steps.title: Identify the author's main disagreement
steps.content: The word However marks where the author shifts from describing what people currently celebrate to identifying a problem: listeners overlook Joplin's lesser-known works. This signals the passage's core argument.

steps.title: Match the argument to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A directly captures the author's main argument about giving more attention to lesser-known works.

The others either focus on a secondary detail rather than the primary call (B), expand the scope incorrectly (C), or describe content not in the passage (D).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
